omitted_declarations.policy_reference:
In some instances we also use Google Admob to show you advertising in the app. On Apple devices we do not allow Google to collect your identifying data. If you are using an Android device, you may request deletion or reset your advertising ID. This will delete any data in Google Admob that could be connected to your device via our services. To do this:
1. On your Android device, go to Settings.
2. For those on Pixel devices: Tap Privacy > Ads (sometimes Ads can appear in Advanced drop-down menu)
3. For those on Samsung devices: Tap Google > All Services > Ads
4. Tap Reset Advertising ID and confirm your changes.

In some instances we also use Google Admob to show you advertising in the app. On Apple devices we do not allow Google to collect your identifying data. If you are using an Android device, you may request deletion or reset your advertising ID. This will delete any data in Google Admob that could be connected to your device via our services. To do this:
1. On your Android device, go to Settings.
2. For those on Pixel devices: Tap Privacy > Ads (sometimes Ads can appear in Advanced drop-down menu)
3. For those on Samsung devices: Tap Google > All Services > Ads
4. Tap Reset Advertising ID and confirm your changes.

With Whom We Share Your Personal Information
Personal Information (and non-personal information) collected through the
PicCollage Services may be shared with companies and organizations that
perform services on our behalf (for example, companies that provide data
management or other support services to us such as Heroku). We may share
your Personal Information (and non-personal information) with third-party
advertising services (including Google) to serve you relevant advertising and
market our products, but we won't sell your Personal Information. We may also
share the content you are creating in the app with trusted third-party partners to
provide you with services within the app, such as OpenAl for image and video
processing. Also, we may disclose the Personal Information we collect through the
PicCollage Services to government authorities, industry peers or other third
parties when we, in good faith, believe (i) there has been a violation of our terms,
policies, or the law or (ii) disclosure is required to:
1. comply with a legal obligation;
2. protect and defend our rights or property;
3. detect, investigate or prevent fraud or other illegal activity;
4. protect the safety, security, and integrity of our products, employees, users, or
the public;
5. protect against legal liability;
6. provide you with services in the app. We may upload your visual data (content
you are creating in the app that may include raw Face Data) to trusted third-
party services that we partner with for processing. These providers are
contractually obligated to handle user data in accordance with applicable
privacy laws and industry standards. Please review their privacy policies to
understand how they store and use your data.
• OpenAl. Privacy Policy: https://openai.com/privacy
• Google Gemini. Privacy Policy:
https://support.google.com/gemini/answer/13594961
• Replicate. Privacy Policy: https://replicate.com/privacy
• Flux. Privacy Policy: https://fluxl.ai/privacy
7. enforce the Terms of Service or other agreements that govern your use of the
PicCollage Services and/or any of our other services;
